languages.text: "У одного господина есть очень ценный артефакт, с которым ему стоит расстаться."

traits.locale_text: "У одного господина есть очень ценный артефакт, с которым ему стоит расстаться."

languages.text: "There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."
languages.original_text: "У одного господина есть очень ценный артефакт, с которым ему стоит расстаться."

traits.locale_text: "There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."
"There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."
"There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."

languages.text: “有个人手里有一件价值不菲的宝物，我想从他手里夺过来。”
languages.original_text: "There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."

traits.locale_text: “有个人手里有一件价值不菲的宝物，我想从他手里夺过来。”

languages.text: « Un certain individu détient un artefact de très grande valeur dont j'aimerais le séparer. »
languages.original_text: "There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."

traits.locale_text: « Un certain individu détient un artefact de très grande valeur dont j'aimerais le séparer. »

languages.text: "Çok değerli bir esere sahip bir adam var. Onun o esere veda ettiğini görmek istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."

traits.locale_text: "Çok değerli bir esere sahip bir adam var. Onun o esere veda ettiğini görmek istiyorum."

languages.text: «Cierto hombre posee un artefacto muy valioso y quiero que deje de ser suyo».
languages.original_text: "There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."

traits.locale_text: «Cierto hombre posee un artefacto muy valioso y quiero que deje de ser suyo».

languages.text: "Es gibt da einen Mann, der im Besitz eines sehr wertvollen Artefaktes ist, und ich möchte, dass Ihr es ihm abnehmt."
languages.original_text: "There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."

traits.locale_text: "Es gibt da einen Mann, der im Besitz eines sehr wertvollen Artefaktes ist, und ich möchte, dass Ihr es ihm abnehmt."

languages.text: 「非常に価値のある遺物を所持している男がいる。私は彼からそれを奪いたい。」
languages.original_text: "There is a man in possession of a very valuable artefact, and I wish to see him parted from it."

traits.locale_text: 「非常に価値のある遺物を所持している男がいる。私は彼からそれを奪いたい。」
